# Everything-PR: The Leading Independent Publication for Public Relations, Marketing & AI Communications

> Everything-PR is the leading independent PR industry publication, published daily since 2009. Covers public relations strategy, crisis communications, media relations, marketing, social media, AI communications, and agency news. Editor and founder: Ronn Torossian.

## About
- [About Everything-PR](https://everything-pr.com/about/): independent PR publication founded 2009
- [Editorial Policy](https://everything-pr.com/editorial-policy/)
- [Ethics Policy](https://everything-pr.com/ethics-policy/)
- [Corrections Policy](https://everything-pr.com/corrections-policy/)
- [Contact](https://everything-pr.com/contact/)

## Pages
- [Homepage](https://everything-pr.com/)
- [All News](https://everything-pr.com/category/news/)
- [Research](https://everything-pr.com/category/research/)

## Proprietary Research & Studies
- [PR Spend Transparency Study 2026](https://everything-pr.com/pr-spend-transparency-study-2026/): how Fortune 500 companies budget for PR
- [The AI Company Comms Study 2026](https://everything-pr.com/ai-company-comms-study-2026/): how leading AI companies communicate
- [The Foreign Influence PR Study 2026](https://everything-pr.com/the-foreign-influence-pr-study-2026/): foreign-government PR spend in the US
- [The Nonprofit PR Transparency Study 2026](https://everything-pr.com/nonprofit-pr-transparency-study-2026/): PR spend across the nonprofit sector
- [The Municipal & State PR Spend Study 2026](https://everything-pr.com/municipal-state-pr-spend-study-2026/): public-sector PR budgets in the US
